ground_truth.title: New Titles on Streaming • FlixPatrol
ground_truth.main_content: New Titles on Streaming calendar showing release dates for movies and TV shows across multiple streaming platforms. The table displays titles with their release dates, country of origin, premiere dates, streaming platforms (Netflix, Hulu, Amazon, HBO Max, Disney+, Paramount+), genres, ratings, and rankings. Entries include Jake Paul vs. Anthony Joshua (Netflix, Dec 19), Kumail Nanjiani: Night Thoughts (Hulu, Dec 19), Cover-Up (Netflix, Dec 19), Breakdown: 1975 (Netflix, Dec 18), 10DANCE (Netflix, Dec 18), Emily in Paris (Netflix, Dec 18), What's in the Box? (Netflix, Dec 17), Murder in Monaco (Netflix, Dec 17), Fallout (Amazon, Dec 17), Culinary Class Wars (Netflix, Dec 16), The Creature Cases (Netflix, Dec 15), Robby Hoffman: Wake Up (Netflix, Dec 14), The Revenge Club (Paramount+, Dec 12), Jasmine (HBO Max, Dec 12), Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh (HBO Max, Dec 12), City of Shadows (Netflix, Dec 12), Goodbye June (Netflix, Dec 12), Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show (Disney+, Dec 12), Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The End of an Era (Disney+, Dec 12), Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery (Netflix, Dec 12), Home for Christmas (Netflix, Dec 12), Belphegor (HBO Max, Dec 11), The Fakenapping (Netflix, Dec 11), Man Vs Baby (Netflix, Dec 11), Tell Me Softly (Amazon, Dec 11), Tomb Raider: The Legend of Lara Croft (Netflix, Dec 11), The Town (Netflix, Dec 11), Simon Cowell: The Next Act (Netflix, Dec 10), Merv (Amazon, Dec 10).
with: Jake Paul vs. Anthony Joshua is a Movie on Netflix released on Dec 19, 2025.
Kumail Nanjiani: Night Thoughts is a Comedy Movie on Hulu released on Dec 19, 2025.
The table shows new titles across multiple streaming platforms including Netflix, Hulu, Amazon, HBO Max, Disney+, and Paramount+.
Emily in Paris (season 5) is a weekly TV Show on Netflix that premiered on Oct 02, 2020.
Fallout (season 2) is a Science Fiction TV Show on Amazon with a rating of 8.3/10.
